questionText: A 208V single-phase circuit has a 2.5% voltage drop on the feeder. What is the maximum ADDITIONAL voltage drop permitted on the branch circuit per NEC recommendations?
explanation: NEC recommends a maximum total voltage drop of 5% for feeder + branch circuit combined. With 2.5% on the feeder, only 2.5% remains for the branch circuit (5% - 2.5% = 2.5%).
necReference: 210.19(A) Informational Note No. 4; 215.2(A)(2) Informational Note No. 2
sparkyTip: Think of the 5% total as a budget — whatever the feeder uses, the branch circuit gets the rest!
